name: mojo-adr009-test-file-split
description: Split Mojo test files exceeding the ADR-009 limit of ≤10 fn test_ functions per file to prevent Mojo v0.26.1 heap corruption crashes. Use when: (1) a Mojo test file has more than 10 fn test_ functions, (2) CI fails intermittently with libKGENCompilerRTShared.so JIT fault, (3) implementing ADR-009 heap corruption workaround.
